📊 **AI 科研日报** — 2026年05月29日 周五

## 🔥 GitHub 开源项目精选
1. [UditAkhourii/adhd](https://github.com/UditAkhourii/adhd)
   ADHD — a skill for coding agents. Tree-of-thought with pruning, built on the Cla | ⭐461
2. [adelaideacfalle50838568946/ChatGPT-Pro-Desktop-2026](https://github.com/adelaideacfalle50838568946/ChatGPT-Pro-Desktop-2026)
   A comprehensive desktop application package for advanced ChatGPT interactions an | ⭐289
3. [withkynam/vibecode-pro-max-kit](https://github.com/withkynam/vibecode-pro-max-kit)
   Your AI forgets. This remembers. Spec-driven coding harness for vibecoders, prod | ⭐277
4. [realrossmanngroup/no_ai_slop_writing_rules](https://github.com/realrossmanngroup/no_ai_slop_writing_rules)

5. [deckerpaislee89916/AI-Voice-Mod-Pro-Studio-2](https://github.com/deckerpaislee89916/AI-Voice-Mod-Pro-Studio-2)

6. [manuelageske58246958801/DeepFake-AI-2026-RealTime](https://github.com/manuelageske58246958801/DeepFake-AI-2026-RealTime)
   An advanced, LLM-powered toolkit providing comprehensive capabilities for ethica | ⭐202
7. [beykantemel0702azfy8144/WorpGPT-Latest-2026-AllPrompts](https://github.com/beykantemel0702azfy8144/WorpGPT-Latest-2026-AllPrompts)
   A comprehensive Red Teaming framework for testing Large Language Model (LLM) rob | ⭐202
8. [cellinlab/how-pi-agent-works](https://github.com/cellinlab/how-pi-agent-works)
   Pi Agent 原理与实现 | ⭐181

- Agent + 工具调用持续火热
- 推理效率优化成为焦点
- 多模态模型进展迅速
- 本地部署需求增长
